title: MORE implementation
body: "Following the passing of the Medical Devices (Post-market Surveillance Requirements) (Amendment) (Great Britain) Regulations 2024, the MHRA has updated its processes and procedures to ensure that trends, patterns or signals that may reveal new risks or safety concerns are identified more efficiently. This will allow both the MHRA and the whole healthcare system to better protect patients.   For documentation to support these changes, see Documentation for implementation of data requirements under the new Post-Marketing Surveillance regulations  "
